## 📚 Documentation Issue

### Description
What is the issue with the documentation?

### Type
- [ ] Typo/Grammar
- [ ] Missing information
- [ ] Outdated information
- [ ] Confusing explanation
- [ ] Request for new documentation
- [ ] Translation improvement

### Location
Which document or section needs improvement?

### Proposed Changes
What changes would you like to see?

### Additional Context
Add any other context or suggestions for improvement.

### Related Issues
- Related to #(issue number)
